title: hemianemia villosa
intro: Hemianemia villosa, also known as "velvet leaf," is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues. Hemianemia villosa can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves are often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
intro_study: According to "Medicina (Kaunas, Lithuania)", hemianemia villosa (also known as TJ-108) benefits pregnant women by improving anemia through its boosting effect on myelohematopoiesis.
